view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for one offer version exposing multiple admission paths is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for one offer version exposing multiple admission paths is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided demonstrates that the system allows a single offer version to handle both queue and online bookings simultaneously. Specifically, the linked use case describes a scenario where a barbershop sells one 'Men’s Haircut' offer that accommodates walk-ins and online bookings without creating duplicate offers. Additionally, the successful booking evidence for both queue and online slots confirms that the requirement for multiple admission paths is effectively implemented.
